# llms.txt — metadata for Language Model crawlers
# Replace example values with your real site data
site_name: Bet4ever
site_url: https://bet4ever.online/
contact: webmaster@example.com
crawl_allowed: true
preferred_models: gpt-4,gpt-4o
notes: "This is a simple, non-standard file to help LLM crawlers understand site usage. Adjust fields as needed."
